refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements, and manage their updates and history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and calibration history as required.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs, and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates and maintain history of performance requirements

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine with worksite input interface
Version-controlled management system for requirement updates
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining derivation engine, database repository, and version control to fulfill all sub-FRs cohesively

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation logic and data storage
Version control dependencies on both derivation and recording
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of reliable worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if version control is not robust
High safety criticality demands rigorous validation of derivation algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing version control separately if complexity grows to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the overall NGHE system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance requirements to other NGHE subsystems

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication for updates and history synchronization

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary owner of the DP with high containment and low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module has minimal containment; including DP here would increase diffusion risk.
Teleoperation module unrelated to performance requirement derivation; poor containment.
Safety Services may consume performance data but not suitable for containment.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the DP in the NGHE Solution module ensures coherent management and traceability of performance requirements with minimal diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex
Interface dependencies on Telemetry and Network Link must be robust to avoid data loss
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module size and consider splitting if complexity or diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are clearly mapped to candidate DPs with logical cohesion and traceability.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to strong containment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support assignment to NGHE Solution with minimal interface complexity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records accessible through NGHE Solution interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Review interface robustness with Telemetry and Network Link modules
Plan for scalability of NGHE Solution module as requirements evolve

decision.justification: All gates passed with clear FR to DP to IM mapping, strong containment, and manageable diffusion risks. Verification approach is feasible and allocation is clear.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates and maintain history of performance requirements

revise.why: Current level decomposition and assignments are sound; no immediate revision needed.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is reliable and timely
Version control mechanisms are robust and secure
open_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
Interface dependency failures impacting data integrity
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability from worksite inputs to performance targets
Validation of version control and update management processes
